response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for both songs. The middle dialogue segment (02:36-03:52) features a character speaking English and reading Japanese text from a paper; I have transcribed the spoken English and Japanese precisely, using on-screen Indonesian/Japanese text for disambiguation. Timestamps are tightly wrapped around vocal audio with no overlaps.
